name: Tax Compliance Check — Monthly BIR Validation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(['odoo', 2, 'admin', 'account.move.line', 'search_read', [[['company_id', '=', 2], ['parent_state', '=', 'posted'], ['tax_line_id', '!=', false], ['date', '>=', $('Calculate Date Range').first().json.date_from], ['date', '<=', $('Calculate Date Range').first().json.date_to]]], {'fields': ['name', 'move_id', 'tax_line_id', 'debit', 'credit', 'balance', 'partner_id', 'account_id'], 'limit': 500}]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4.1', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a Philippine tax compliance expert specializing in BIR regulations. Analyze tax data for TBWA\SMP and provide a compliance assessment. Reference specific BIR forms, deadlines, and penalties. Format as markdown with: ## Compliance Score, ## VAT Analysis, ## EWT Analysis, ## Issues Found, ## BIR Filing Calendar, ## Recommended Actions.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Tax compliance check for period: ' + $json.period + '

Sales invoices: ' + $json.sales_count + ' (PHP ' + $json.sales_total.toFixed(2) + ')
Purchase bills: ' + $json.purchase_count + ' (PHP ' + $json.purchase_total.toFixed(2) + ')
VAT collected: PHP ' + $json.vat_collected.toFixed(2) + '
Tax lines: ' + $json.tax_lines_count + '

Issues found (' + $json.issue_count + '):
' + JSON.stringify($json.issues.slice(0, 15)) + '

BIR deadlines this month (' + $json.current_month + '):
' + JSON.stringify($json.deadlines) + '

Sample invoices:
' + JSON.stringify($json.invoices_sample) }], max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.2 }) }}

parameters.text:
=:receipt: *Monthly Tax Compliance Check Complete*
• Period: {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.period }}
• Sales: {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.sales_count }} invoices (PHP {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.sales_total.toFixed(2) }})
• Purchases: {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.purchase_count }} bills (PHP {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.purchase_total.toFixed(2) }})
• Issues found: {{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.issue_count }} ({{ $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.high_severity }} high severity)
• Task created in Tax Compliance project, assigned to BOM

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', task_id: $('Odoo — Create Compliance Task').first().json, period: $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.period, issues: $('Validate Tax Compliance').first().json.issue_count }) }}
